message:
feat(abi): nativize __ivaliduser as deny-all (.rhosts auth is deprecated)

__ivaliduser now returns -1 (deny) unconditionally, matching modern
security practice of disabling .rhosts-based authentication.

GCT: 382→381, Implemented: 2010→2011

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
